agents.name: Explorer Agent
agents.role: Surfaces the relevant silver models for the plant operations question. Starts from the yield problem, not the file tree.
agents.sample_input: Find models related to first-pass yield, brake-caliper line, defect modes, shift grain, and supplier lots.
responsibilities: Runs status to confirm the dbt project is parsed and healthy
Runs search with manufacturing vocabulary against model names, columns, and descriptions
Hands the candidate model list to Summary

agents.name: Summary Agent
agents.role: Explains the grain of each upstream, the join keys, and where the gap is. Decides before any SQL whether the data can answer the question.
agents.sample_input: For those models, show grain, key columns, and how they join. Where is the gap between what exists and what plant ops asked for?
responsibilities: Runs describe on each candidate model to confirm grain
Runs lineage to validate the join path
Names the new grain the gold table has to land on

agents.name: Worker Agent
agents.role: Authors the SQL and model file. Creates gold.fct_yield_by_plant_line_shift_daily with the right CTE structure, supplier-lot join, defect-mode aggregation, and final select.
agents.sample_input: Create gold.fct_yield_by_plant_line_shift_daily as a table materialization. Validate grain with a deterministic dbt_show slice before committing the file.
responsibilities: Runs warehouse and dbt_show on a targeted slice to validate proposed grain
Writes the SQL file with header comments, CTEs, supplier-lot join, and final aggregation
Materializes the model to the gold schema on Iceberg

agents.name: Verification Agent
agents.role: Adds dbt tests, schema contract, and ownership. Validates lineage and confirms downstream consumers can read the new asset.
agents.sample_input: Add tests covering uniqueness on (plant_id, line_id, shift_id, production_date) and not-null on first_pass_yield. Confirm lineage picks up the new gold table.
responsibilities: Writes the YAML companion with description, tests, and schema contract
Confirms uniqueness and not-null tests pass against the materialized slice
Updates lineage so downstream consumers pick the asset up immediately
